name: BD KINGS LANES BAR AND GRILL

violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Working container holding food item was not labeled properly to identify contents. - Several containers in the fridges need to be dated and labeled.
Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. - Kitchen equipment in need of more thorough cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Kitchen in need of more thorough cleaning along floor edging and under equipment.
